commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the kingdom and dominion, and the greatness of the kingdom under the whole heaven, shall be given to the people of the saints of the most High, whose kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and all dominions shall serve and obey him. In other words, this is the end of all the affairs of this life, all the empires of earth coming to a close and the eternal kingdom being given to the saints of the Most High, with those in charge obeying and devotely serving Him, since His kingdom is eternal and does not come to an end. (Theodoret of Cyrus).

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Him. The power of the Machabees was too limited, to be here understood. The Church and Christ must be meant.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Here the reference is to Christ's empire, which is eternal.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
